title: NoCraft
description:
This is a mod for Minecraft 1.21.4. The goal is to create a game experience where the player cannot craft anything and must perform all tasks only with items naturally generated in the game. 
To enable and disable the mod use: /nocraft enabled true
body:
Imagine playing Minecraft and not being able to use the Crafting Table? That's the idea, and the mod serves as a basis for you to try this challenge. You'll have to use your imagination and look for items that are generated in the world so you can do things like farms and buildings.
The mod disables crafting in the user's inventory (2x2) and crafting that is done on the Crafting table (3x3). This way, you can enjoy this adventure without worrying about doing a craft by accident.

To enable and disable the mod. To do this, simply use the command:
/nocraft enabled true
